_comment: Registry for the multi-report build (Phase 2). NOT yet read by build.py — the current pipeline still runs from sectors.json + master_prompt.md and is untouched. Each report = its own prompt + its own page at site/<slug>/. 'enabled' gates what the new build will run; 'schedule' groups reports by run time so cron-job.org can fire the right set. 'status' tracks readiness.

reports.name: Sector Intelligence Report
reports.status: live as 5 separate sector pages today; to be CONSOLIDATED into one page (ranked overview + per-sector drill-downs)

reports.name: Gap Risk Report
reports.status: prompt in repo (raw); pending pipeline adaptation (sidecar + house style + sources + disclaimer)

reports.name: Mean Reversion Report
reports.status: prompt in repo (raw); pending pipeline adaptation

reports.name: Market Wrap Report
reports.status: prompt not written yet; runs AFTER the close, not at 6 AM
